item.title: CentOS Apache SSL
item.author: Author
item.description: openssl Check Installed 1 sudo yum list installed | grep openssl Install openssl 1 sudo yum install openssl mod_ssl Check Installed Install mod_ssl 1 sudo yum install mod_ssl Check Module mod_ssl.so 1 ll /etc/httpd/modules/mod_ssl.so Load Module In Apache 1 2 3 4 5 # Main Config File sudo vi /etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf # Or some of apache version sudo vi /etc/httpd/conf.
